deblur.positive: Your task is to sharpen this exact photo and recover fine detail, keeping natural, neutral, true-to-life colors so it still looks like a real photograph. Keep every object, person and the background exactly as in the input, clearing haze only where it is present. Photorealistic.
deblur.notes: Неплохо, но снова пересат на лабораторном кадре (вероятно, влияние Q4-кванта - strength уже снижен).

relight_day.positive: Your task is to convert this scene into clear, bright midday daylight - blue sky, real sunlight, natural shadows. You MUST keep every object, person, vehicle and the text on signs sharp and unchanged in position and shape; only the lighting and the sky change. Photorealistic.
relight_day.notes: В целом отлично, артефактов почти нет - кроме одного странного знака.

object_insert_fire.positive: Your task is to add a real fire that has broken out on a dry, solid surface that physically exists in this scene (the floor or an object), placed to match the geometry and perspective: natural spreading flames with smoke and embers, resting on solid ground. Keep all water exactly as it is and place the fire only on dry land; keep all people, objects and the background unchanged and normally lit. Photorealistic.
object_insert_fire.notes: Снова 'сожгло' воду на лагуне. Геометрию горящей стойки не поняло - просто набросило огонь как попало.

normalize.positive: Your task is a gentle, neutral photographic clean-up only: balanced exposure, natural white balance and realistic, true-to-life colors. The result MUST look like a real, unedited photograph with natural color. Keep all content, objects, people and the type of lighting exactly the same. Photorealistic.
normalize.notes: Пересат (даже при сниженном strength 3.0 - вероятно, влияние Q4-кванта).

change_clothing.positive: Your task is to dress every person already in this photo - including anyone in a uniform or work clothes - in a clown costume (colorful polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, big shoes, clown hat), keeping the realistic look of a low-quality surveillance-camera still with natural, muted colors. You MUST keep each person's own real bare face, keep exactly the same number of people in their original positions and natural poses, and keep the same background. Dress the real people and keep them as themselves. Photorealistic.
change_clothing.notes: Сменило людям позы, люди стали совсем другими; перспектива и геометрия помещения не поняты - клоуны воткнуты как попало. Пожарных заменило на двух клоунов, смотрящих в камеру.
